goal: Build Lock Type 03 (Altitude North) from scratch at LOG400 in Rhino instance 'interior' (port 9003), including the missing roof system.

phases.name: Spec Roundtable
phases.note: Skipped — user asked to build directly. Spec was derived inline from lock_01 pattern + 00_Workflow_v04.md LOG400 definitions.

notes: Built in one session. Inclined track modeled as proper sloped prism (extrusion along slope vector). Sloped roof slab built as tilted Brep. Roof added to both stations — the missing piece from the original spec.
_copy_note: This is the lock_03-specific copy. The original phase_status.json may be used by another Claude instance.
